---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to routing, compatibility, console UX, or deployment flows
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem to Solve

What workflow is currently hard, slow, or impossible?

## Proposed Idea

Describe the feature you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain the user or operator benefit.

## Alternatives Considered

List any workaround or competing approach you already tried.
